narrative:
Bowling Green 3-D (precinct in Wood County) has 1,151 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points.
